description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Stake exactly 500 LUMA into the highest-APY LUMA staking pool that offers at least 10% APY with a lock period of 30 days or less, and enable daily auto-compounding for the rewards.

tasks.instruction: Stake exactly 200 USDT into a flexible (no-lock) USDT staking pool that has at least 5% APY, a platform fee of at most 0.5%, and choose LUMA as the rewards token.
tasks.name: Stake exactly 200 USDT into a flexible (no-lock) USDT staking pool that has at least 5% APY, a platform fee of at most 0.5%, and choose LUMA as the rewards token.

tasks.instruction: Unstake 300 LUMA from your lowest-APY LUMA staking position that earns under 8% APY and re-stake those 300 LUMA into the LUMA pool with the highest APY among pools offering at least 10% APY and a lock period of 15 days or less.
tasks.name: Unstake 300 LUMA from your lowest-APY LUMA staking position that earns under 8% APY and re-stake those 300 LUMA into the LUMA pool with the highest APY among pools offering at least 10% APY and a lock period of 15 days or less.

tasks.instruction: From the rewards dashboard, claim unclaimed points from exactly two different programs where each has between 20 and 40 unclaimed points, so that the total newly claimed points is between 50 and 60.

tasks.instruction: Create an automatic staking plan that stakes 50 USDT every week for 8 weeks in a flexible USDT pool with at least 4% APY, starting on the next upcoming Monday.

tasks.instruction: In the earnings calculator, simulate staking 1,000 LUMA for 90 days in a LUMA pool with APY between 9% and 11%, then save the scenario with the label "90-day LUMA plan".
tasks.name: In the earnings calculator, simulate staking 1,000 LUMA for 90 days in a LUMA pool with APY between 9% and 11%, then save the scenario with the label "90-day LUMA plan".

tasks.instruction: Join an active LUMA boosted-APY promotion that increases APY by at least 2 percentage points and runs for at least 7 days, and apply it to one of your existing LUMA staking positions that has at least 100 LUMA staked.

tasks.instruction: Cast a Yes governance vote using exactly 100 LUMA of voting power on an active proposal that ends within the next 5 days and has a quorum requirement of at least 40%.
